question: Extend the `Book` class to include a parameterized constructor that accepts and initializes `title`, `author`, and `isbn` upon object creation. Demonstrate its usage.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The C++ Programming Language
Author: Bjarne Stroustrup
ISBN: 978-0321563842
Title: Effective C++
Author: Scott Meyers
ISBN: 978-0321334879

errors: Member variables initialized using assignment in the constructor body instead of the initializer list. For non-POD types like `std::string`, this leads to default construction followed by assignment, which is less efficient than direct initialization.
Global 'using namespace std;' directive is used, which can lead to name collisions and reduced readability in larger projects, especially when included in header files.
